verse.name: v1
verse.lines: This old world ain't getting better, everyday it's getting worse So much fighting and confusion going on down here on earth But I won't let it bother me cause I'm not here to stay. The lord is going to call me home and I'll be called away.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Were gonna be gone in the twinkling of an eye Were gonna be gone won't have time to say goodbye Maybe, morning, night, or noon. For I know it can't be too soon. For I know, I know, I'm gonna be gone.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It could be just any morning, It could be at night or noon, I don't know just when He's coming, But I know He's coming soon. I can say with calm assurance, This old world is not my home, One day your going to look for me, But I'll be called away.
